title: OS AMIGOS

festivals_detail.name: Mostra Internacional de Cinema de São Paulo

description: An intimate São Paulo drama by Lina Chamie about friendship, grief, and healing after loss. Premiered at the Festival de Brasília and praised for its sensitive storytelling and strong performances.

title: AUGUSTA E ANTONICO

awards_detail.event: Festival De Cinema De Rua De Remígio
Encontro Nacional De Cinema E Vídeo Dos Sertões
Encontro Nacional De Cinema E Vídeo Dos Sertões

description: A shortfilm love story filmed in 35mm with the leggendary ARRI BL2 in Curitiba, my hometown

title: PEDRO E BIANCA

awards_detail.event: APCA (Associação Paulista de Críticos de Arte)

awards_detail.category: Best Fiction Program for Children & Youth

description: A teen drama that went far beyond its modest audience to become one of TV Cultura’s most acclaimed shows. It tackled school and social themes with honesty, winning the International Emmy Kids Award, the Prix Jeunesse International, and APCA recognition. A true milestone in Brazilian youth television.

title: QUE HORAS ELA VOLTA

awards_detail.event: São Paulo Association of Art Critics
São Paulo Association of Art Critics

festivals_detail.name: São Paulo Association of Art Critics

description: Directed by Anna Muylaert and starring Regina Casé, this acclaimed social drama won the Berlin Panorama Audience Award and was Brazil’s submission to the Academy Awards. A landmark film on class and motherhood.

title: EXPERIMENTOS EXTRAORDINARIOS
description: The first Brazilian live-action series on Cartoon Network, co-produced with Canal Futura. Created by the popular Manual do Mundo team, it brought their millions of YouTube fans to TV. The show helped Cartoon Network surpass Discovery Kids and cement its lead in Brazilian kids’ cable.

title: CINELAB
description: A mix of science, cinema, and special effects, Cinelab turned DIY movie experiments into a hit format. Produced by Boutique Filmes, it became a cult favorite on Universal Channel and spawned multiple seasons.

title: BREAKOUT BRASIL
description: A reality show for 12 up-and-coming Brazilian bands, competing over eight episodes with only original songs — no covers. The winner took home a Sony Music recording contract and career management. Live performances, online voting via Google/YouTube, and a jury including Supla, Bianca Jhordão, and Lucas Silveira gave the show both energy and credibility.

title: QUAL VAI SER
description: A documentary series about the challenges of education and the choices young Brazilians face after school. Broadcast nationwide on TV Globo, reaching families across the country.

title: WHEN THE DOGS BARK

awards_detail.event: New York City Independent Film Festival

description: A thriller short film about security paranoia

title: SOLACE
description: A psychological thriller directed by Afonso Poyart, starring Anthony Hopkins, Colin Farrell, and Jeffrey Dean Morgan. Released internationally, it drew attention for its star power and tense atmosphere.

title: A GRANDE LUTA
description: Documentary exploring Brazilian martial arts, with appearances from greats like Acelino “Popó” Freitas and Muhammad Ali. Aired across Latin America on Cinemax, bringing international spotlight to the fighters’ stories.

title: QUE TALENTO S03
description: The very first Brazilian original scripted series on Disney Channel, following the adventures of a teen band navigating life and music. It resonated deeply with Latin American audiences, blending pop culture and youthful energy in an authentic local format.

title: LOS ANGELES NO TIENEN ALAS
description: A small independent feature by Enrique Boh, set on the Ecuadorian coast. It screened on the Latin American festival circuit, reflecting the vitality of emerging Ecuadorian cinema.

title: VILANOVA ARTIGAS THE ARCHITECT AND THE LIGHT

awards_detail.event: Architectures Film Festival Lisboa – Lusofonia Award
APCA Prize – São Paulo Arts Critics Association

festivals_detail.name: Architectures Film Festival Lisboa – Best Film (Lusofonia)
Mostra Arq Futuro de Cinema e Arquitetura
Archcine – Intl. Architecture Film Festival (Rio de Janeiro)

description: A portrait of Vilanova Artigas, a key architect of Latin American modernism. Blending archival material with visits to six iconic works, the film reveals the relationship between architecture, light, and social vision.

title: A GAROTA DA MOTO S01
description: An action-packed drama about a fearless motorcycle courier protecting her son. A huge success on SBT, it averaged over 11 IBOPE points in São Paulo, peaking at 14 and even leading the audience in some cities. One of the most-watched Brazilian series of the decade on free-to-air TV.

title: LILI A EX S02
description: Comedy series about relationships and breakups, adapted from Caco Galhardo’s popular cartoon. Its witty, fast-paced episodes made it one of GNT’s standout originals, praised for sharp humor and relatable themes.

title: A SECRETARIA DO PRESIDENTE
description: A lighthearted comedy mixing politics and romance, following the daily chaos of a president’s secretary. With quick humor and a playful tone, it fit Multishow’s lineup of irreverent originals aimed at young adult audiences.

title: BLITZ
description: Crime drama directed by Rene Tada Brasil, about a police officer accused of killing a student during a school blitz. Released in Brazilian theaters by Pandora Filmes and later on VOD.

title: NATUREZA MORTA
description: Serial-killer noir set in São Paulo’s fashion scene: a star photographer hides a deadly secret. Starring Erom Cordeiro and Nanda Costa, the season premiered on April 22, 2018 and later landed on Prime Video.

title: O PIOR ALUNO DA ESCOLA
description: Comedy feature directed by Fabrício Bittar, based on Danilo Gentili’s book. Starring Carlos Villagrán (“Quico” from Chaves), it became a box-office success in Brazil thanks to its irreverent humor.

title: ZOO DA ZU S02
description: A playful preschool series set in a fantastical zoo, starring Zu, a curious girl who talks to animals. One of Discovery Kids’ most popular Latin American originals, it expanded across the region and earned an International Emmy Kids nomination.

title: O AMOR DA VOLTAS

festivals_detail.name: Mostra Internacional de Cinema de São Paulo

description: A light-hearted romantic comedy where chance encounters and missed connections shape the path of love. Shot in a Rio de Janeiro coast paradise location: Arraial do Cabo

title: SWEET HEART
description: A coming-of-age short set in São Paulo's Liberdade neighborhood about a Brazilian-born Chinese teenager. A naturalistic short blending non-actors and intimate observation to capture cultural clash and self-discovery.

title: FERRUGEM

awards_detail.event: San Sebastián – Films in Progress Industry Awards

awards_detail.category: CAACI/Ibermedia TV Films in Progress Award

description: A haunting portrait of adolescence in the digital age, where a leaked intimate video sets off a chain of irreversible consequences.

title: QUERIDA MAMAE
description: An umberable drama that unravels the complexities of family, memory, and unresolved emotions. Do not recomend it, the whole movie is a non stop arguing of 3 generations of women, shot in studio and directed by a 75 y.o. man. I'm sorry but it's true.

title: THE YELLOW NIGHT

awards_detail.event: Brooklyn Horror Film Festival – Head Trip Feature Competition

description: A group of teenagers gathers on a remote island, where reality begins to fracture. The Yellow Night blends coming-of-age with science fiction, building a hypnotic, disorienting atmosphere intensified by the sound design, earning us a nommination for best sound award.

title: EXPLODE SAO PAULO GIL

festivals_detail.name: Olhar de Cinema – Festival Internacional de Curitiba

description: A domestic worker in São Paulo dreams of becoming a singer. Is hybrid documentary-fiction explores authorship, power, and the pursuit of dreams through music and cinema.

title: DIVINE LOVE
role: Add. Prod. Sound Mixer; Boom Operator
description: A near-future Brazil where religion, technology, and state control merge into everyday life. It's a bold, sensual dystopia blending satire, spirituality, and social critique.

title: LAMENTO

awards_detail.category: Best Actor, Best Actress, Best Cinematography, Best Art Direction

description: Indie drama by Diego Lopes and Claudio Bittencourt about grief and guilt in the aftermath of loss. Festival-circuit title in Brazil; limited theatrical/TV play.

title: MESMO COM TANTA AGONIA

festivals_detail.name: Festival Internacional De Curtas De São Paulo
Curta Cinema – Festival Internacional De Curtas Do Rio

description: A colorful, energetic short film about a working mother racing against time to reach her daughter's birthday party she so carefully planned. That feeling of the everyday struggle of a 20-million-person city where public transport becomes an obstacle.

title: A GAROTA DA MOTO S02
description: The biker heroine returned with even more action and suspense. The premiere scored 11.9 IBOPE points in São Paulo, a 15% increase over season one’s debut, proving the show’s lasting appeal on free-to-air TV.

title: FERAS
description: An urban dramedy set in São Paulo’s nightlife, mixing music, parties, and tangled relationships. With strong LGBTQ+ representation and the irreverent freedom of MTV, it stood out as a fresh take on youth drama. It also earned nominations at the Grande Prêmio do Cinema Brasileiro, including Best Sound.

title: A MULHER QUE SOU

awards_detail.event: Olhar De Cinema – Festival De Curitiba

festivals_detail.name: Janela Internacional De Cinema Do Recife

description: A character-driven short film that follows Marta, a single mother who moves to a new town to rebuild her life, rediscover her independence.

title: HELEN

awards_detail.event: Festival do Roteiro de Língua Portuguesa
Festival de Cinema Latino-Americano de Toulouse

festivals_detail.name: Festival do Roteiro de Língua Portuguesa
Festival de Cinema Latino-Americano de Toulouse
Mostra de Cinema de Ouro Preto (CineOP)
Festival LE ZOLA – Reflets du Cinéma

description: Feature drama by André Meirelles Collazzo, starring Marcélia Cartaxo and Thalita Machado. Inspired by real events, it follows a 9-year-old girl in a São Paulo tenement trying to buy a birthday gift for her grandmother. Selected at Cinélatino Toulouse.

title: SAO PAULO HEIST
description: A high-stakes action crime thriller unfolds during a bank robbery in São Paulo, where precision and chaos collide in real time.

title: JESUS KID
description: Dark meta-comedy by Aly Muritiba, adapted from Lourenço Mutarelli. Premiered on the festival circuit; won Best Screenplay – Festival de Gramado 2021.

title: INVISIBLE CITY S01
description: A Netflix fantasy-thriller rooted in Brazilian folklore that quickly resonated globally. It hit #1 most popular show in Brazil, and landed in the Top 10 in 12 countries, including France and Spain. Lauded for weaving myth into mystery and showcasing Brazil’s stories to the world.

title: SPECTROS
description: A supernatural thriller set in São Paulo’s Liberdade district, blending Japanese folklore with Brazilian urban legends. Created and showrun by Douglas Petrie (American Horror Story, Daredevil), the series marked one of Netflix’s boldest cross-cultural originals in Brazil.

title: A QUEEN IS BORN
description: A drag reality show hosted by Gloria Groove and Alexia Twister. Contestants were mentored in performance, fashion, and self-expression, bringing Brazilian drag culture to a global Netflix audience.

title: DETETIVE MADEINUSA
description: Brazilian comedy starring Tirullipa and Whindersson Nunes, directed by Rodrigo Van Der Put. A clumsy ex-politician turned rookie detective is hired by a billionaire lobbyist to investigate the theft of a prize bull—kicking off a chaotic case with a creator-economy all-star ensemble (GKay, Bruno Montaleone, Aisha Jambo). Premiered exclusively on Amazon Prime Video on November 12, 2021, with a worldwide platform release.

title: TPM MEU AMOR
description: Comedy directed by Eliana Fonseca, written by Jacqueline Vargas, starring Paloma Bernardi. Produced by Moonshot Pictures with Star Original Productions/Claro; distributed by Galeria Distribuidora. Brazil theatrical release: 31 Aug 2023.

title: EL PRESIDENTE 2 CORRUPTION GAME
description: A sharp satire about FIFA’s power plays, this season followed João Havelange’s rise across continents. Showrun by Oscar-winner Armando Bó, it earned an International Emmy nomination for Best Drama Series, strengthening its global prestige.

title: UNDER PRESSURE S05
role: Add. Prod. Sound Mixer; Boom Operator

awards_detail.category: Best Performance by an Actress — Marjorie Estiano

description: One of Globo’s biggest drama hits, blending medical emergencies with intense personal stories. Season 5 kept strong ratings on free TV, often above 20 IBOPE points (≈4 million households), and drew international attention with screenings in more than 20 countries.

title: AREA DE SERVIÇO
role: Add. Prod. Sound Mixer; Boom Operator
description: A comedy created by Pedro Cardoso, planned as part of HBO Max’s original Brazilian slate. Production was halted during development and the project never aired, remembered as one of the high-profile cancellations when the platform restructured its content.

title: AS FIVE S02
description: Spin-off of Malhação: Viva a Diferença, following five friends as they navigate adulthood. Seasons 2 and 3 consolidated the series as a Globoplay flagship, praised for its authentic take on modern youth and consistently drawing a loyal fanbase.

title: ESCOLA DA QUEBRADA
description: Youth comedy co-produced by Paramount+ and KondZilla, directed by Kaique Alves & Thiago Eva. Premiered on Paramount+ on 3 Mar 2023 (official trailer released by the platform). International Emmy nominee (2024) – Kids: Live-Action.

title: AS FIVE S03
description: Spin-off of Malhação: Viva a Diferença, following five friends as they navigate adulthood. Seasons 2 and 3 consolidated the series as a Globoplay flagship, praised for its authentic take on modern youth and consistently drawing a loyal fanbase.

title: UMA GAROTA COMUM
description: A tropical, musical teen drama starring Colombian pop sensation Juliana Velásquez (Grammy Latino 2021 winner), who plays Alana—an international star hiding as an ordinary girl in small-town Brazil. Packed with dance, original songs, and reimagined hits, it’s Disney fun reinterpreted through Latin flair and youthful storytelling.

title: TARÃ
role: Add. Prod. Sound Mixer; Boom Operator
description: An ambitious Amazonian fantasy directed by Marco Dutra and Juliana Rojas. With icons Xuxa Meneghel, Angélica, and Fafá de Belém. Featuring original music by indigenous composer Djuena Tikuna, the production built a full Amazonian village set in Acre, blending spectacle, culture, and Disney magic.

title: BACK TO 15

awards_detail.category: Best Fiction Series for Young Adults

description: A coming-of-age dramedy where a 30-year-old woman wakes up in her 15-year-old self’s body. Based on the hit novel by Bruna Vieira, it became one of Netflix Brazil’s most popular YA shows, reaching audiences in over 100 countries and praised for its mix of nostalgia, humor, and heart.

title: THE HIJACKING OF FLIGHT 375

festivals_detail.name: Inffinito Brazilian Film Festival (New York / Miami)
Festival du Film Brésilien de Montréal

description: A tense dramatization of a real-life aviation crisis that shook Brazil in the late 1980s. The Hijacking of Flight 375 recreates the moment a commercial flight is taken hostage mid-air, escalating into a national emergency

title: DA PONTE PRA LA
description: A gripping São Paulo-set drama where a young rapper investigates the suspicious death of her trans best friend. Loaded with social commentary and fueled by trap and rap subculture, the series was one of Max’s early Brazilian hits—landing in the Top 10 most-watched shows on the platform shortly after its debut.

title: SCARS OF BEAUTY
description: This was Max’s most-watched Brazilian original ever — the telenovela set records in hours viewed and audience reach. From day one, it delivered 24× more demand than the platform’s average; by its finale, it reached a staggering 70× the normal viewership — a milestone achieved by less than 0.2% of monitored content globally. Even after the finale, it remained the most-watched title daily on Max Brazil. Internationally, it ranked in the Top 3 Latin American locally produced shows and broke into the Top 10 in the U.S. and Top 15 in Europe.

title: O DIA EM QUE MINHA VIDA MUDOU
description: A kids’ adventure comedy based on the books by Keka Reis. Produced by Loma Filmes, it brings relatable schoolyard stories and everyday chaos to life with humor and heart, connecting with Brazil’s younger audiences on Gloob and Globoplay.

title: O REI DA INTERNET
description: Based on a true story, a Brazilian teen becomes one of the country's top hackers, joins a criminal ring moving millions, and lives a lavish life until a Federal Police operation brings it down before he turns 17.

title: DE MENOR
description: An inventive fiction series that transforms courtroom sessions involving at-risk youth into genre-bending storytelling—one episode is a musical, another a game, yet another a TV show or podcast. Directed by Caru Alves de Souza, it earned a world premiere at the 2025 Berlinale (Generation 14plus), marking it as one of Brazil’s most imaginative and socially charged TV entries this year.

title: 100 DAYS
description: Live-action feature directed by Carlos Saldanha about explorer Amyr Klink’s 1984 solo South Atlantic row, inspired by the book One Hundred Days Between Sky and Sea. Produced by Ventre Studio with Buena Vista International/Disney; filming wrapped Sept 2024 with a 2025 theatrical target. Cast includes Filipe Bragança.

title: SOLO MIO
description: Rom-com directed by The Kinnane Brothers, starring Kevin James with Alyson Hannigan and Kim Coates. Angel Studios to distribute; release set for Feb 6, 2026.

title: L'ALTRO ISPETTORE
description: A new Rai crime drama filmed in Lucca, with its medieval streets and Renaissance walls as backdrop. The series premiered on Rai 1 on December 2, 2025, to strong viewership, with over 3 million viewers for its debut.

title: L'ABBAGLIO
description: Historical drama by Roberto Andò (Rai Cinema), set in 1860 during Garibaldi’s Expedition of the Thousand. Filmed in Sicily; Italian theatrical launch 16 Jan 2025.

title: CARO MONDO CRUDELE
description: New feature by Niccolò Falsetti (with Francesco Turbanti), produced by Disparte with Fandango and Mompracem; Toscana Film Commission support. Filming started in Maremma (Tuscany) in May 2025.

title: TUTTO SU MIO PADRE
description: A RAI documentary about memory, justice, and the legacy of those who served the rule of law in Italy. Blends personal testimony and archival footage.
